comment.body:
Few questions! Thanks in advance for all the alpha you provide, and any answers you give to these questions. Please know I respect your time enough to not expect an answer to each of these, and acknowledge that these questions might not be optimal. I am thankful for any response in any capacity. 

1) what catalysts are you looking for (and on what time horizon) to trigger the correction down to ~6100/6000? Or if not, 
is the correction/reversion to mean  all mechanical? 
2) is it reasonable to expect a VIX climb to 20-30 on the correction, whenever it occurs? Or is it possible they could “walk it down” and keep vol suppressed <20? 
3) how long is your window of risk, and what do you use to determine if there’s a continuation or the bottom is in? 
4) (more macro and perhaps conspiracy theory) with Trump appointing new BLS advisors, do you think the amount of potential catalysts are reduced with Trump “cooking the books”? Narrative seems to be “bullish all the time under this admin, we will never get a bearish print again, esp. with earnings no longer being quarterly and him stacking the Fe 
5) is European debt crisis concerns valid? If so, on what time horizon? 

TL;DR I’m struggling to identify what the market would recognize as a valid catalyst to trigger the reversion to mean/~10% correction, or full on “crash” (20%+) and don’t have confidence to know (or what to look at) to determine when the correction (whenever it occurs) is bottoming, or if it would keep going. 

I have December Vega puts on a bet that something “happens” between now and then, but don’t know what to look for to inform me when the bottom is in (if we do decline meaningfully in that time, and if we don’t, I roll) 

Thank you again for your time, hope you have a good weekend .

comment.body: here spx with weekly levels overlaid.  30m TF watching strictly the mopex regressions and their extensions.  i will be watch GREEN -1SD which mean lines up with the high end range of weekly levels and confirmation if we do in fact make a run up there..   as for down side, we have +1 for both previous 2 months regression and failure there will confirm we start to fall to the mean and hopefully lower.  Primal target for now,  which is Monthly AVWAP tap, lower would be may-jun mopex, jan feb mopex, and q3 avwap..  anyways just sharing my homework roast away if u like :)
